utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present); travel_dates (present with dates); transportation (has flight route and a cost range, but not full flight details like airline/times—however format asks for flight details with costs; minimally present); accommodation (hotel, room type, and a single cost—present); activities (list provided but no costs—missing required costs); additional_services (listed but no costs—missing required costs); total_budget (a total cost range but not a complete breakdown—missing detailed breakdown). Fully specified check: destination (fully specified), travel_dates (specific dates—fully specified), transportation (cost included but flight details are minimal; still counts as included since costs provided), accommodation (hotel selection with costs—fully specified), activities (missing costs—fails), additional_services (missing costs—fails), total_budget (not a complete cost breakdown—fails). Thus, 4 items fully specified out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each element from the final package to the matching item in the ground-truth. Destination: 'Rome, Italy' maps to destinations['Rome, Italy'] rating 8. Transportation: specified as 'Economy Class' on standard airline (Paris to Rome) which maps to transportation.standard_airlines.Economy Class rating 6. Accommodation: 'Tranquil Inn (3-star)' matches accommodation['Tranquil Inn'] rating 4. Activities: 'City Walking Tour' -> activities['City Walking Tour'] rating 9; 'Museum Day Pass' -> activities['Museum Day Pass'] rating 7; 'Cooking Class' -> activities['Cooking Class'] rating 6. Additional services: 'Premium Travel Guardian Service' does not exist in ground-truth, so no rating can be mapped.
